description: Create and configure a Video Wall for the 'Distribution Hub SOC' using the Nx Witness REST API (https://localhost:7001/rest/v1/, Credentials: admin / Admin1234!). The Video Wall must be named 'Distribution Hub SOC' with 'autorun' enabled and a 2x2 screen configuration (1920x1080 per screen). Create four layouts: 'SOC - Parking View' (containing 'Parking Lot Camera'), 'SOC - Entrance View' (containing 'Entrance Camera'), 'SOC - Server Room View' (containing 'Server Room Camera'), and 'SOC - Overview' (containing all three cameras). Assign these layouts to the Video Wall items as follows: 'Parking View' (Top-Left), 'Entrance View' (Top-Right), 'Server Room View' (Bottom-Left), and 'Overview' (Bottom-Right). Save a summary report containing the Video Wall name and item details to /home/ga/video_wall_report.txt.
